blended.narrative: Hogadon is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 49°F, winds around 24 mph.
Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 48°F, gusts to 41 mph.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
